items.title: Funnel diagnosis: 0 Amazon clicks (30d) — TRAFFIC problem, not link problem
items.detail: All 134 Amazon links across lld.html (58), fuzzy.html (31), asc.html (45) verified correctly tagged with saltybayfli0c-20. So 0 clicks is upstream: Pinterest impressions are real (Fuzzy 112/30d) but 0 outbound clicks; TikTok Laura had 435 video views/7d but only 2 profile views (0.46% CTR). Levers: (a) finish the LLD posts 23-27 Studio caption-CTA edit, (b) add stronger CTAs to Pinterest pin descriptions on existing pins, (c) increase pin volume per niche to widen the top-of-funnel.

items.title: Edit captions in TikTok Studio (LLD posts 23-27)
items.detail: 5 live-scheduled @laurasunkist posts have OLD captions without the bio CTA we just added. Open Studio scheduler → click each post → paste new caption from local caption.txt. ~25 min.

items.title: Schedule scottish_fold Fuzzy pin for 5/12
items.detail: Fills 1-day gap in Fuzzy schedule. Image is already in _gemini_passed/. Open Pinterest pin builder, drag image, run scheduling automation.
